title: Set out conservation earthworks
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Set out conservation earthworks demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Interpret plans and specifications

pcs.text: Determine overall objective of construction work from plans and in consultation with landholder and surveyor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine overall objective of construction work from plans and in consultation with landholder and surveyor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site for prevailing conditions and identify inconsistency with plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures.
